product.description:
For over 2 decades, fassler is the leading producer of premium quality smoked salmon and seafood products in Singapore
Our smoked salmon products are made fresh daily in our gold award winning production facility.

metaData.Key Information: Salt reduced version brings the natural flavour of the salmon and is very well liked by customers. It does, however, not preserve the fish as well as the heavily salted recipes of the past.
metaData.Nutritional Data:
Attributes Per Serving Size: (50g)
Calories 70kcal
Total Fat 2.61g
Saturated Fat 0.52g
Trans Fat 0.01g
Polyunsaturated Fat 1.1g
Monounsaturated Fat 0.88g
Cholesterol 16.98mg
Sodium 476mg
Carbohydrate 0.62g
Dietary Fibre 0g
Sugars 0.25g
Protein 11.02g
metaData.Storage Information:
• Keep refrigerated at all times
• Smoked salmon is ideally stored at 0°C to 4°C
• Freshly smoked salmon may be frozen for use at a later stage
• If frozen you may add 90 days to the expiry date on the label
• Once open consume within 2 days

product.name: Fassler Smoked Salmon - Traditional
